agentAbility.name: Strike Laser
agentAbility.description: Calls in an aircraft and takes control of its targeting camera to lock on to an enemy vehicle. The aircraft points a laser that emits damaging pulses.

agentTrait.name: NBC Protection
agentTrait.description: A decontamination system that removes all status effects from the vehicle.

primaryAttack.name: Autocannon
primaryAttack.description: Fires large-caliber armor-piercing rounds capable of piercing lightly armored vehicles.

tankAbilities.name: TOW ATGM
tankAbilities.description: Activates TOW missiles to punch through armor and set targets on fire.

tankAbilities.name: Laser Designator.
tankAbilities.description: Traces a target and makes it Vulnerable.
